chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1428 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.4939/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4940/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2022 Mr. Muhammad Sulleman Dahri, Advocate for the petitioners. == Urgency is granted. The petitioners, by way of instant petition have sought for their appointments in civil service on priority basis for the reasons that they have donated the plot for construction of dispensary in their village. The appointment in civil service is to be made on merits after vide publicity as per the procedure prescribed by service law and not on the basis of plot donation; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
